cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.body: Cookies keep you signed in, remember your cart, and — with your permission — help us understand how the site is used so we can improve it. You can change your mind any time.
cookieConsent.onlyNecessaryTitle: Use only essential cookies needed to run the site
cookieConsent.prefsDescription: Choose which categories of cookies you’re comfortable with. Necessary cookies are always on because the site can’t work without them.
cookieConsent.rowNecessaryDesc: Authentication, cart contents, security, and site preferences. Required for the site to function. Always on.
cookieConsent.rowFunctionalDesc: Remember your delivery pincode, theme preference, and recently viewed products. Helps the site feel personal across visits.
cookieConsent.rowAnalyticsDesc: Anonymous usage statistics — page views, bounce rate, traffic sources — through Google Analytics and our own first-party event tracking. Helps us improve the site.
cookieConsent.rowMarketingDesc: Used by Meta, Instagram, and other ad platforms to measure how marketing campaigns are performing and to show you more relevant ads on those platforms.
cookieConsent.fullListPrefix: Full list of cookies, durations, and third parties:

intlOrder.title: Request International Order
intlOrder.description: We ship internationally on a per-order basis. Submit your contact and shipping details — we’ll email a shipping quote and payment instructions for your country within 24 business hours.
intlOrder.notesPlaceholder: Any special requests, gift wrapping, preferred delivery dates, etc.
intlOrder.errMissingFields: Please fill in all required fields.
intlOrder.successToast: Order request received — we’ll email you a quote within 24 hours.

kplusBanner.tagline: Free delivery for {months, plural, one {# month} other {# months}} at just ₹{price}. Skip shipping charges and shop your K-beauty favorites with more value on every order.
kplusBanner.footnote: Activate once and enjoy shipping-free orders for 3 months.

kplusPage.title: K Plus Membership
kplusPage.subtitle: Free shipping for 3 months at a flat ₹199.
kplusPage.benefit1Body: Skip shipping fees on every eligible order across India.
kplusPage.benefit2Body: Membership applies the moment payment is confirmed — no waiting period.
kplusPage.benefit3Body: Membership is valid for 90 days from activation, so frequent shoppers stay covered.
kplusPage.faqA1: Once your membership is active, all eligible orders ship free regardless of cart value. No coupon code needed.
kplusPage.faqA2: Memberships last 90 days from activation and don’t auto-renew. Just renew when you’re ready.
kplusPage.faqQ3: What if my order misses delivery?
kplusPage.faqA3: Standard shipping promises still apply. Contact us if there’s a delay — we’ll sort it out.

searchPage.title: Search
searchPage.noQuery: Type a query above to search our catalogue.
searchPage.tryAgain: Try a different spelling or browse our categories instead.

categoryPage.empty: No products found in this category.

shop199Page.title: Shop@199
shop199Page.subtitle: Grab the glow before the deals are gone

aboutPage.heroDescription: Your trusted destination for authentic Korean beauty and lifestyle products, bringing the best of Consumer Innovations directly to your doorstep.
aboutPage.pullQuotePart1: We exist to bring authentic Korean beauty —
aboutPage.valuePremiumBody: Carefully curated and sourced from trusted Korean brands. We don’t stock anything we wouldn’t put on our own face.
aboutPage.valueReachBody: Reliable doorstep delivery from Chennai metro to the islands, with transparent ETAs at the pincode level.
aboutPage.valueCustomerBody: Hassle-free returns, real human support, and personalised K-beauty recommendations when you ask.
aboutPage.valueAuthenticBody: Sourced direct from brands or authorised distributors in Korea. No grey market, no surprises.
aboutPage.storyPara1: MadenKorea was founded with a simple mission: to make authentic Korean beauty and lifestyle products accessible to everyone in India. What started as a passion for K-beauty has grown into a trusted marketplace connecting thousands of customers with their favourite Korean brands.
aboutPage.storyPara2: We understand the challenge of finding genuine Korean products locally, which is why we’ve built strong partnerships with verified vendors and brands in Korea. Our team personally tests and verifies each product to ensure it meets our quality bar.
aboutPage.storyPara3: We’re committed to providing not just products, but a complete K-beauty experience. From skincare routines to makeup trends, we keep you updated with the latest from Korea’s beauty industry. Our blog and social channels share tips, tutorials, and insights to help you make the most of your purchases.
aboutPage.storyPara4: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust MadenKorea for their K-beauty essentials. Experience the difference of authentic Korean products today.
aboutPage.whyAuthenticityBody: Direct sourcing from Korea ensures 100% genuine products, every time.
aboutPage.whyCurationBody: Hand-picked products from the best K-beauty brands, not an algorithmic dump.
aboutPage.whyPricingBody: Best prices without compromising on quality. No hidden surcharges at checkout.
aboutPage.whyShippingBody: Quick delivery across India with real tracking and pincode-aware ETAs.
aboutPage.whySupportBody: Beauty experts ready to help with product recommendations — over email or WhatsApp.
aboutPage.supportNotePrefix: Customer support and Grievance Officer contact details are on our

contactPage.heroDescription: Questions about a product, an order, or anything K-beauty? Reach us through the form below or any of the channels on the right — we typically reply within 24 hours during business hours.
contactPage.formDescription: Fill the form and pick whichever channel is easiest for you.
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help…
contactPage.channelFootnote: Email goes straight to our team. WhatsApp opens a chat in your own app with the message pre-filled — you tap Send inside it.
contactPage.errMissingRequired: Name, email, and message are required.
contactPage.errSend: Unable to send your message right now.
contactPage.successToast: Thanks — we’ll get back to you within 24 hours.
contactPage.errMissingWhatsapp: Please enter your name and a message.
contactPage.directDescription: Prefer a quick channel? Pick one of these.
contactPage.whatsappCardBody: Skip the form — open a chat with us on WhatsApp for the quickest response.
contactPage.legalDescription: Statutory disclosures — for grievances, GST queries, or regulatory questions.
contactPage.grievanceDescription: For unresolved complaints · acknowledged within 48 hrs · resolved within one month.

faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.subtitle: Short answers to the questions we get most often. If you can’t find what you need, reach out and we’ll help.

servicesPage.title: Our services
servicesPage.subtitle: Beyond the storefront — what else we can help with.

orderSuccess.fallbackInfoMyOrders: Your order was placed successfully. You can view full details in My Orders.

pdp.intlShippingBody: Submit an order request and our team will email you a shipping quote for your country within 24 hours.
pdp.perkFreeShippingTip: Pan-India delivery is free once your cart crosses ₹{amount}. K Plus members get free shipping on every order.
pdp.perkEasyReturnsTip: Raise a return within 7 days of delivery for a damaged, defective, or wrong item. Pickup is arranged from your address.
pdp.perkSecurePaymentTip: All payments are processed by Razorpay over an encrypted PCI-DSS-compliant connection. We never see or store your card details.
pdp.perkAuthenticProductsTip: Every product is sourced directly from the brand or its authorised distributor in Korea. No grey-market stock, no expired batches.

influencerRequest.heroTitle: Partner with us. Share consumer innovations from Korea. Earn more.
influencerRequest.heroBody: Join our creator circle for Korean skincare and wellness. Your audience gets a discount and you earn commission — together capped at 20% per product by default for fairness.
influencerRequest.pendingSubmittedOn: Submitted on {when}. We usually review within 1–2 business days.
influencerRequest.benefitInnovationsDesc: Thoughtfully curated formulas and routines your audience trusts.
influencerRequest.benefitInsightsDesc: Transparent performance, attribution, and payout history.
influencerRequest.benefitHasslefreeDesc: Per-product caps auto-enforced. You focus on creating.
influencerRequest.faqCapAnswer: Customer discount + your commission together won’t exceed 20% per product by default. If a product has a lower cap, checkout clamps the split automatically.
influencerRequest.faqGlobalAnswer: Yes. Your code is cart-wide, while caps are enforced per item at checkout to keep things fair.
influencerRequest.faqPayoutsAnswer: We batch commissions regularly. You will see the pending or paid status of each commission, plus the full payout history, inside your portal.
influencerRequest.modalIntro: Tell us your public handle and a short note about your content. We’ll review and email you.
influencerRequest.modalNotePlaceholder: What do you create? Who’s your audience?
influencerRequest.modalLegal: Global codes apply cart-wide; per-product caps (default 20%) auto-enforced at checkout.
influencerRequest.inlineNotePlaceholder: Tell us briefly about your content and audience
influencerRequest.errSubmit: Failed to submit. Please try again.

influencer.linksEmpty: You haven’t created any tracking links yet.
influencer.promosEmpty: You don’t have any promo codes yet.
influencer.localCurrencyEstimateNote: Amounts shown in {currency} are estimates at today’s exchange rate. Your earnings are recorded and paid in INR.
influencer.walletCreditNote: ≈ {amount} will be credited from your INR wallet at today’s exchange rate.
influencer.walletSectionDesc: Submit your UPI/Bank details and choose an amount to withdraw.
influencer.availableToWithdraw: Available to withdraw: {amount}. You can request any amount up to this balance.
influencer.noApprovedBalance: You do not have any approved balance yet. Once your commissions are approved, they will appear in your available balance and you can request a payout.
influencer.customerDiscountError: Customer discount must be between 0 and {max}%.
influencer.promoListEmptyDesc: Create a simple code your audience can remember.
influencer.recentPayoutsEmptyDesc: You have not requested any payouts yet. Submit your first withdrawal using the form above when you are ready.
influencer.deletePromoConfirm: This will permanently delete this promo code. Active links using this code will stop working. Continue?
influencer.walletModalIntro: Fill in any of the methods you'd like to receive payouts on. You can save as many as you want; admin chooses the best one for each payout.
influencer.walletPreferredDesc: Hint to the payouts team for which channel to try first
influencer.walletErrAtLeastOne: Please fill at least one complete payout method.
influencer.walletErrBankIncomplete: Indian bank: please fill account name, number, and IFSC together.
influencer.walletErrBankIntlIncomplete: International bank: please fill bank, holder, account, and SWIFT or IBAN together.
influencer.noBalanceMessage: You don't have any available balance to withdraw right now. Once your commissions are approved and added to your wallet, you'll be able to submit a payout request here.
influencer.noMethodsDesc: Add at least one method (UPI, bank, international bank, PayPal, or Wise) to your wallet, then come back to request a payout.
influencer.channelDetailsNote: We'll send these details to the payouts team along with your request. To change them, edit your wallet.
influencer.requestPendingHelp: Your payout request will stay in a pending state until our admin processes it. We will notify our payouts team with your details.
influencer.errAmountAboveBalance: You can request up to {max} right now.
influencer.errAddPayoutMethod: Add a payout method to your wallet first.
influencer.errChannelNotPopulated: The selected method isn't fully filled in your wallet.
influencer.payoutsEmptyDesc: When you request a payout, it appears here in a pending state. After we complete it, the status changes to settled.
influencer.promosPageDesc: Create a simple code your audience can remember. Only global codes are allowed.
influencer.promoCapHint: Global code: applies to entire cart; each product's cap is enforced during checkout.
influencer.linksHandleMissing: Handle not found — ensure your influencer profile is approved and has a handle.
influencer.deletePromoConfirmShort: Are you sure you want to delete {code}? This can't be undone.
influencer.errSettingsNotFinalized: Your commission settings have not been finalized yet. Please contact admin.
influencer.errSplitExceedsCap: Customer % plus your commission % must be at most {cap}.
influencer.regionsRestrictedNote: Your promo codes apply only for buyers in the {count} country or countries listed below.
influencer.regionsAdminManaged: Region eligibility is set by admin. Contact them if you would like a change.
influencer.promoSettingsCapHelp: Maximum combined customer + your share per promo.
influencer.promoSettingsDefaultSplitHelp: Used as the starting split when you create a new promo.
influencer.errCodeAlreadyTaken: That promo code is already taken. Try a different one — codes are unique across all influencers.

orderConfirm.subject: Your MadenKorea order {orderNumber} is confirmed
orderConfirm.heading: Hi {name}, your order is on its way!
orderConfirm.intro: Thank you for shopping with MadenKorea. We’ve received your payment and your order is now being processed.
orderConfirm.trackBody: You can view your complete order details, download invoice copies, and check your transaction history anytime from your account.
orderConfirm.needHelpBody: For any support, product queries, or shipment updates, you can reach us at:
orderConfirm.productsNoteHeading: A quick note about your products
orderConfirm.productsNoteIntro: All our products are curated from trusted Korean brands. For the best experience:
orderConfirm.productsNoteTip1: Follow the usage instructions on the product packaging.
orderConfirm.productsNoteTip2: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
orderConfirm.productsNoteTip3: Do a patch test before first use if you have sensitive skin.
orderConfirm.productsNoteOutro: You will see the exact products and quantities for this order inside your account in the Orders section.
orderConfirm.closing: Thank you again for choosing MadenKorea. We’re excited for you to receive your order!
orderConfirm.footer: You’re receiving this email because you placed an order on madenkorea.com.

welcomeEmail.subject: Welcome to MadenKorea, {name}!
welcomeEmail.heading: Welcome, {name}!
welcomeEmail.intro: Your trusted destination for authentic Korean beauty and lifestyle products, bringing the best of Consumer Innovations directly to your doorstep.
welcomeEmail.pullQuote: We exist to bring authentic Korean beauty — unfiltered, unrepacked, untouched — to every doorstep worldwide.
welcomeEmail.valuesHeading: What you'll get with every order
welcomeEmail.valuePremium: Premium quality — sourced from trusted Korean brands.
welcomeEmail.valueAuthentic: 100% authentic — no grey market, no surprises.
welcomeEmail.trendingIntro: Some of our shoppers' favourites this week:
welcomeEmail.footer: You're receiving this email because you just created a MadenKorea account.

verifyEmail.subject: Verify your email for MadenKorea
verifyEmail.heading: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.intro: Please confirm this is your email so we know it's really you. Verifying unlocks checkout, reviews, and partnership tools across MadenKorea.
verifyEmail.fallbackPrefix: If the button doesn't work, paste this link into your browser:
verifyEmail.expiryNotice: This link expires in {hours} hours for your security.
verifyEmail.ignoreNotice: Didn't sign up for MadenKorea? You can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset the password for your MadenKorea account. Click the button below to set a new one.
passwordReset.fallbackPrefix: If the button doesn’t work, paste this link into your browser:
passwordReset.expiryNotice: This link expires in {minutes} minutes for your security.
passwordReset.ignoreNotice: Didn’t request a reset? You can safely ignore this email — your password won’t change.

internationalOrderAck.subject: We received your international order request
internationalOrderAck.heading: Hi {name}, your request has been received.
internationalOrderAck.intro: Thanks for your interest in MadenKorea! Our team will review the items you selected, calculate the international shipping cost to {country}, and reply with a quote and secure payment instructions within one business day.
internationalOrderAck.needHelpBody: Reply to this email or reach us at the contact details below — we’re happy to help.

influencerApproved.subject: Welcome to the MadenKorea K-Partnership program
influencerApproved.heading: Hi {name}, you are in.
influencerApproved.intro: Congratulations — your K-Partnership application has been approved. Your influencer portal is live and ready to use.
influencerApproved.ctaBody: Sign in to create promo codes, share product links, and track your commissions and payouts.
influencerApproved.tipsHeading: A few quick tips to get going
influencerApproved.tip1: Create a memorable promo code so your audience remembers it (e.g. your handle).
influencerApproved.tip2: Use the share-link tool to generate trackable product links — every click and order is attributed to you.
influencerApproved.tip3: Connect your payout details in the Wallet section before requesting your first payout.
influencerApproved.closing: We are excited to have you on board. Reply to this email anytime if you need help.

influencerRejected.subject: Update on your MadenKorea K-Partnership application
influencerRejected.heading: Hi {name}, thank you for applying.
influencerRejected.intro: We appreciate the time you took to apply to the MadenKorea K-Partnership program. After reviewing your application, we are unable to approve it at this time.
influencerRejected.reasonBody: We approve creators on a rolling basis depending on category fit, audience overlap, and program capacity. Being declined today does not close the door — we encourage you to reapply once your content and reach have grown.
influencerRejected.next1: Keep building consistent, original content in the K-beauty and wellness space.
influencerRejected.next2: Engage with our brand on social — comments and tags help us find you.
influencerRejected.next3: Reapply in a few months when your audience or niche fit has evolved.
influencerRejected.closing: Thank you for your interest in MadenKorea. We hope to see your next application.
